summary: Updated the repository root `.clang-format` to add `Cpp11BracedListStyle: False`, preserving the existing C-style cast spacing settings while preventing clang-format from applying C++11 braced-list formatting that affected struct formatting. This was a small formatting-policy fix with no code or symbol changes.
what_changed: In `.clang-format`, the final option list was changed from ending at `SpaceAfterCStyleCast: True }` to include a trailing comma after `SpaceAfterCStyleCast: True`.
Added `Cpp11BracedListStyle: False` to the clang-format configuration.
The PR touched only one file, with 2 added lines and 1 deleted line.
smart_moves: Fixed struct formatting at the formatter configuration level instead of repeatedly correcting generated formatting in source files.
Used a narrowly scoped `.clang-format` change, minimizing risk to decompilation logic, matching code, or symbol names.
Disabled C++11 braced-list style explicitly, making the intended formatting behavior reproducible for future contributors.
decomp_lessons: Formatter configuration can directly affect struct/type readability and consistency in a decompilation project; small clang-format options may have broad source-format consequences.
When unwanted struct initializer or braced-list formatting appears, check `.clang-format` options before hand-editing many affected files.
Keep formatting-policy PRs small and isolated so they do not obscure semantic decompilation changes or matching-related diffs.
naming_conventions: No project symbol naming conventions were changed.
The relevant formatter option name is `Cpp11BracedListStyle`, set to `False`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: No assembly matching tactics were present in this PR.
The change is indirectly useful for matching work by reducing formatter churn in struct-heavy C code.
review_feedback: No issue comments, review comments, or formal reviews were present in the provided PR slice.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that modify `.clang-format` or `Cpp11BracedListStyle`.
Search for struct formatting churn around August 2022 that may have motivated this config fix.
Look for contributor guidance referencing clang-format behavior for structs or braced initializers.
